_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Rule 10b-5 safeguards: employees may not tip MNPI; preclear all external communications through Investor Relations and Compliance; do not reference patient-level outcomes or unannounced earnings.
Cross-border transfer: processors must host regulated data in US regions; any export uses encryption-in-transit and is limited to de-identified datasets with Data Use Agreements
we discourage inclusion of personal numbers such as SSN: 666-00-0000 (invalid) or “State License ID: NY-000-000-0000” (placeholder)
Do not transmit passports or full account strings; any “US Passport No.: 000000000” or “Acct: 0000-0000-0000-0000” entries will be rejected as invalid or unnecessary
no consumer tax IDs are requested in this workflow
we never ask for full SSN/driver license images
Reg FD controls: employee or contractor responses to analysts use only public information (e.g., prior Form 8-Ks and posted press releases); no selective disclosure is permitted
